query: Walk me through this change before I review it — help me understand what it does and where I should focus.
Checkpoint this diff for me: orient me on the intent, point me at the risky parts, and tell me what to test.
Run a human review on this commit so I can make sense of it and decide whether to ship it.
I need to review this PR but I don't know where to start — guide my attention to what matters.
Run an adversarial code review and hunt for every bug and edge case in this diff to gate the merge.
Just implement the refund-rounding fix and write the unit tests for it.
Investigate why partial refunds are off by a cent and trace the root cause.
